error.info: Error: Field alias "_pageName" starts with an underscore (_). This is not allowed in Cargo API queries.
error.*: See https://www.dustloop.com/wiki/api.php for API usage. Subscribe to the mediawiki-api-announce mailing list at <https://lists.wikimedia.org/postorius/lists/mediawiki-api-announce.lists.wikimedia.org/> for notice of API deprecations and breaking changes.
